candidates.why: Exact top-line revenue label; matches Net sales values and is the clean reported total revenue line.
Not revenue; cost-related depreciation.
COGS total, not revenue.
Operating expense, not revenue.

candidates.row_label: Items affecting comparability - sales, general and administration
candidates.why: SG&A comparability item, not revenue.

variables.notes: Selected exact reported revenue total from candidate list.

candidates.why: Exact direct cost line; preferred component over totals.

candidates.row_label: Items affecting comparability (IAC) - cost of goods sold
candidates.why: Comparability adjustment only, not full COGS.
Only a component of cost of revenues, not full COGS.

candidates.row_label: Cost of goods sold Items affecting comparability - Balancing value
candidates.why: Balancing value; should not be used.
Broader total including comparability items; less preferred than exact COGS line.

variables.notes: Selected exact COGS line rather than total or adjustment rows.

Candidate list was empty. Selected exact explicit SG&A row from the Income Statement, which is populated and preferred under the SG&A hierarchy. Manual review flagged because selection is outside candidate list.

candidates.row_label: Amortization of Capitalized Research & Development Expenses - Supplemental
candidates.why: Amortization, not current-period R&D expense.
Exact R&D expense line.
Balance sheet asset gross carrying amount, not income statement expense.

candidates.row_label: Research & Development Costs - Accumulated Amortization & Impairment
candidates.why: Balance sheet contra-asset, not R&D expense.

variables.notes: Selected exact income statement R&D expense line from candidate list.

candidates.why: Broad finance expense line; acceptable fallback if specific interest expense unavailable.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities
candidates.why: Specific interest expense component, but only lease-related.
Most direct and specific interest expense line for debt borrowings.
Specific derivative-related interest component; not preferred standalone line.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities - Supplemental
candidates.why: Supplemental duplicate of lease interest expense.

variables.notes: Priority list uses the most specific reported interest expense first, with broader financial expenses as fallback if labeling changes in other periods.

candidates.why: Total equity includes non-controlling interests, so less preferred for BE when a parent-only equity line exists.
Entire balance sheet total, not equity.

final_choice.row_label: Equity attributable to owner of the Parent company

variables.notes: Candidate list missed the preferable parent-only equity line present in the Balance Sheet. Selected 'Equity attributable to owner of the Parent company' to avoid double counting with MIB. Manual review flagged because selection is outside candidate list. | Escape-hatch used (final_choice outside candidate list): [Balance Sheet] Equity attributable to owner of the Parent company

candidates.why: Limited to discontinued operations, not balance sheet minority interest.

candidates.row_label: Non-controlling interests Earnings per share  owners of the Parent company Earnings per share before and after
candidates.why: Malformed/non-standard income statement line, not balance sheet NCI.
Income statement OCI-related line, not balance sheet MIB.
Exact balance sheet NCI line; preferred for MIB.
Equivalent balance sheet minority interest label; useful fallback.

variables.notes: Selected balance sheet non-controlling interest line, with synonymous fallback label.
